reviews.comment:
Good for sitting and working, or for having team meetings. Capacity is of around 20-30 people max.
The staff is good. The food is tasty, authentic. I tried margarita pizza and pasta, plain cold coffee and java chip cold coffee. 10/10 for all. Reasonable rates (acc to service and taste).

reviewReply.comment: We’re glad you found us a great spot for working and team catch-ups. Happy to hear the Margherita flatbreads, pasta, and cold coffees hit the mark for you. Looking forward to hosting you and your team again soon.
